title: Phase 7E Proof Bundle — Calibration + Schema Cleanup

prerequisite_merges.title: P7E-02: Calibration metrics in scoring telemetry

assertions.claim: Per-band calibration/reliability slices are defined and wired

evidence.calibration_in_result: ScoringResult.calibration includes scoredCount, avgModelScore, trustFamiliesAvailable, avgTrustWinRate, totalTrustSampleSize
evidence.logged: run.completed event includes calibration summary in structured JSON
evidence.no_threshold_changes: EDGE_THRESHOLDS, UNCERTAINTY_CAPS, CLV_THRESHOLDS unchanged in packages/domain/src/bands/thresholds.ts

assertions.claim: Candidate-to-pick linkage is governed and clean

evidence.single_write_path: board-pick-writer.ts:updatePickIdBatch() is the only path that sets pick_id on pick_candidates
evidence.no_side_channels: grep 'pick_id.*=' in candidate-scoring-service.ts, system-pick-scanner.ts, alert-submission.ts returns 0 matches in write context
evidence.direction: Confirmed clean in PHASE7E_EXECUTION_PLAN.md — no cleanup needed

assertions.claim: No fake placeholders remain in the scoring path

evidence.no_hardcoded_uncertainty: grep '0\.2' candidate-scoring-service.ts returns 0 matches in scoring logic
evidence.no_hardcoded_confidence: grep '0\.8' candidate-scoring-service.ts returns 0 matches in scoring logic
evidence.fail_closed: Missing champion → candidate skipped with no_champion_skip log (lines 166-175)
evidence.test: P7E: missing champion model skips candidate fail-closed — assert noChampionSkipped === 1

assertions.claim: Deprecated source cleanup conditions are explicit

evidence.documented: PHASE7E_EXECUTION_PLAN.md §3 lists all deprecated artifacts with explicit conditions
evidence.flag_renames_deferred: SYSTEM_PICK_SCANNER_ENABLED and SYSTEM_PICKS_ENABLED rename deferred as cosmetic

phase_7e_gate_verdict: PASS — all 4 assertions hold. Phase 7E is complete.
phase_7_verdict: Phase 7 (Governed Syndicate Machine) is COMPLETE. All 5 sub-phases (7A–7E) are gated and closed.
